text.title: Technology Stack Selection Decision Tree Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure applying the decision-tree-tech-stack methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.input: Team roster, perf targets, hiring data, ecosystem deps.
step.action: Fill prerequisites; any blank cell blocks progression.

step.name: data-shape-first
step.action: Draw a one-page data-shape diagram and pick datastore family before language.

step.name: apply-team-expertise-branch
step.action: If a candidate stack has ≥70% expertise concentration, default to it; else continue.

step.name: apply-workload-niche-branch
step.action: Route by niche (real-time, AI, browser, JVM).

step.name: risk-budget-check
step.action: If framework < 2y GA, require risk_budget_weeks + fallback plan.

step.name: emit-adr
step.action: Compose ADR with chosen + rejected + rationale + review_trigger.
step.decision-gate: Missing rejected list or review_trigger → reject.
